Project.Brief history of your project and organi:
Dapper Labs is the company behind NBA Top Shot, the officially licensed NBA digital collectibles platform. Founded in 2018, Dapper Labs built the Flow blockchain and has facilitated over $1 billion in NBA Top Shot transactions across hundreds of thousands of collectors globally. NBA Top Shot moments are officially licensed video highlights representing significant cultural and financial value to the collector community.
This application seeks Filecoin archival storage for approximately 85,000+ rendered media assets (~500GB) comprising video highlight clips and hero images associated with NBA Top Shot Moments. More rendered media assets will be uploaded to FileCoin as they are minted on the Flow blockchain. These assets are currently pinned on IPFS via Pinata and are publicly accessible via their content identifiers (CIDs). We are seeking Filecoin sealed storage to provide a cryptographically verifiable archival layer independent of any single centralized provider.
Project.Describe the data being stored onto File:
The data being stored onto Filecoin are the video and image assets associated with a NBA Top Shot Moment NFT. 

For example, here are the associated assets for a Top Shot Moment with NFT ID 51270528

Medias:

  - HTTPFile  video/mp4      https://assets.nbatopshot.com/media/51270528/video

  - IPFSFile  PLAYER         QmNsjRZrRHNBRGyhUuWWYKteic2h7ezkchaq6Fu1rkqBAK
  - HTTPFile  PLAYER         https://ipfs.dapperlabs.com/ipfs/QmNsjRZrRHNBRGyhUuWWYKteic2h7ezkchaq6Fu1rkqBAK

  - IPFSFile  VIDEO_SQUARE   QmV6b5F2Pvba8eHjJTdBqVFzwY7iWpjgRFY6ybAs8q7Tun
  - HTTPFile  VIDEO_SQUARE   https://ipfs.dapperlabs.com/ipfs/QmV6b5F2Pvba8eHjJTdBqVFzwY7iWpjgRFY6ybAs8q7Tun

  - IPFSFile  HERO           QmXqyspzY3xd8yadYAQVSiMQzz6X6zNaTK7eNVc3F2efyG
  - HTTPFile  HERO           https://ipfs.dapperlabs.com/ipfs/QmXqyspzY3xd8yadYAQVSiMQzz6X6zNaTK7eNVc3F2efyG

All assets are listed here: https://dapperlabs.github.io/dapperlabs-ipfs-reference-app/
Project.Please share a sample of the data (a lin:
IPFS assets associated with the NBA Top Shot project will be listed here: https://dapperlabs.github.io/dapperlabs-ipfs-reference-app/

IPFS assets for a Top Shot Moment NFT can also be queried for on the Flow blockchain.
